description: Anthropic Messages streaming for a function tool call that has no arguments. Validates tool-input start/end boundaries and the final tool-call JSON string normalization (empty input => {}).

source.notes: Replayed via FakeAnthropicClient; encoded as canonical AI SDK v3 JSONL via encodeV3StreamParts.

notes: A tool call with no args should still result in `input` being a JSON object string ("{}").
